title: dryopteris cavaleriei
intro: Dryopteris cavaleriei, also known as Cavalerie's wood fern, is a species of fern native to China. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing pain, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, Dryopteris cavaleriei is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
